EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The root certificate of the oVirt Engine host expires on {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} enrolled the certificate of host {datafield6} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to enroll the certificate of host {datafield6} on host {event_src.host}
The certificate of host {datafield6} is invalid on host {event_src.host}
The certificate of host {datafield6} expires on {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
The oVirt Engine host certificate expires on {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
